One of these is the HomePower 3600 Plus Portable Power Station with an extra battery and 500W solar panel for $3,134.05 shipped, which is currently unavailable over at Amazon. This bundle carries a $5,899 MSRP direct from Jackery, and while we have seen the occasional spikes to that rate at Amazon, deals there tend to only climb as high as $4,579 lately, with discounts having gone as low as $3,099, which was last seen in March. Now, you’re getting a combined $2,765 savings with the bonus 5% discount, giving you the second-lowest price we have tracked overall. Head below to learn more, as well as browse the other two included bundles in this flash sale.
